violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Bag of ham in walk in cooler is not date marked. -No date on nacho cheese in prep table.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Pineapple dated 7/10/2026.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue/spill at bottom interior of 2 door refrigerator. -Some debris at can opener.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Wet cloths left on sani side drain board after wiping down cold table. *Should be stored in sani bucket solution between uses.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Bag of ham and container of chopped onions in make table were not date marked. -Full container of portion pulled pork in walk in cooler was not date marked.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Dust/debris at drawer below right side stainless prep table. -Grease residue at back hinge area of dough prep. -Crumb/debris below cooling racks used for dish air dry. -Residue at light switch of dry storage/mop room.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
